description: Add priority field (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW) to tasks with filtering and sorting capabilities

userStories.title: Priority Type Definitions
userStories.description: Create TypeScript types and interfaces for task priority field
acceptanceCriteria: Task interface updated with priority field
userStories.notes: Foundation layer - must complete before service updates

userStories.title: Priority Service Logic
userStories.description: Update task service to handle priority in create and update operations
acceptanceCriteria: Priority defaults to MEDIUM if not specified
userStories.notes: Service layer - backend logic for priority handling

userStories.title: Priority UI Components
userStories.description: Create reusable PriorityBadge and PrioritySelector components
acceptanceCriteria: PriorityBadge component renders with color coding (red/yellow/blue)
userStories.notes: Reusable components - can be built in parallel with service layer

userStories.title: Priority Component Integration
userStories.description: Integrate priority components into TaskForm and TaskCard
userStories.notes: Integration layer - requires both service and components ready

userStories.title: Priority API Endpoints & Browser Verification
userStories.description: Update API endpoints to accept priority and verify complete flow in browser
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/tasks accepts priority in request body
API validation rejects invalid priority values
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill: create task with priority, edit priority, view priority badge

userStories.title: Priority Filter Backend
userStories.description: Implement server-side priority filtering in API and service layer
acceptanceCriteria: taskService.list filters by priority when specified
Query returns only tasks matching priority

userStories.title: Priority Filter UI & Verification
userStories.description: Add priority filter to UI and verify filtering works end-to-end
acceptanceCriteria: Priority filter dropdown added to TaskFilters component
Filter state managed in tasks page
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill: apply priority filter, verify only matching tasks shown

userStories.title: Priority Sort Backend
userStories.description: Implement server-side priority sorting in API and service layer
acceptanceCriteria: taskService.list sorts by priority when specified

userStories.title: Priority Sort UI & Verification
userStories.description: Add priority sort to UI and verify sorting works end-to-end
acceptanceCriteria: Priority sort option added to TaskSort component
Sort state managed in tasks page
Tasks display in correct priority order
Sort preference saved in user settings
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill: apply priority sort, verify HIGH tasks appear first
